heading: Compensation of Parliamentarian of Senate
label: 6535 Compensation of Parliamentarian of Senate
text: The Parliamentarian of the Senate may be paid at a maximum annual rate of compensation not to exceed $39,000.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61b of this title
